item.title: Download Adobe Substance 3D Modeler 1.22.7.1239 Pre-activated
item.description: Adobe Substance 3D Modeler is a 3D sculpting and modeling application that helps you create on both desktop and VR. Modelers aim to make working in 3D as intuitive as working with clay in real life. To help achieve this, with Adobe Substance 3D Modeler you don't have to worry about adjusting vertices or managing UVs, you can instead focus on the creative process. With its intuitive design, Adobe Substance 3D Modeler frees you from the technical constraints of traditional 3D modeling....

It will also prevent Windows automatically re-install drivers when you reboot your computer, leaving you a drivers graphics common until you install...

item.title: Download Balabolka 2.15.0.914
item.description: Balabolka is a text-to-speech (TTS) program. It can read text on your screen in a human-like voice. You can use Balabolka to listen to text from a variety of file formats, convert text to spoken audio files, and adjust speech parameters such as speed and pitch. It is often used for accessibility purposes, helping people who have difficulty reading or multi-tasking by listening to text while doing other activities. Balabolka supports multiple languages and uses different TTS engines,...

item.title: Download AnyLogic Pro 8.9.8

The unique flexibility of the modeling language allows users to capture the complexity and heterogeneity of business, economic, and social systems at any desired level of detail. item.title: Download HFS: HTTP File Server (version 3) 3.0.10
item.description: HFS is a web file server to run on your computer. Share a folder or even a file thanks to the virtual file system. Essentially, this application turns your computer into an HTTP server and all users who want to connect and download files can do so by loading a simple website in their browser. HFS includes many configuration settings, so you can basically change each part of the application, starting with how users download files and ending with the appearance of the created website. item.title: Download Duolingo: language lessons 6.74.5
item.description: Duolingo is a popular language learning app that offers interactive lessons to help users learn new languages. This application offers many languages for you to choose from, including Spanish, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, Chinese, Japanese and many more. This app offers an gamified learning experience with interactive lessons, exercises, and quizzes designed to help users learn new words, phrases, and grammar rules. This app is designed to be easy to use and suitable for people...

item.title: Download All PDF Editor & Reader | Xodo 10.13.2
item.description: Xodo PDF Reader & Editor is a mobile application for reading and editing PDF documents on Android and iOS devices. The app allows users to view, annotate, and edit PDF files using a variety of tools, including highlighting, underlining, and adding notes. With Xodo, you can read, annotate, sign, and share PDFs and fill out PDF forms, all while syncing with Google Drive, Dropbox, and OneDrive.
